text: Due to a lack of recent reported sales of Manufactured Homes in Colfax, IL, an extensive search was made in competing communities to find comparable manufactured homes. Comparables #1, #2, & #3 are located in competing comparable communities in Central Illinois and therefore have not been adjusted for location. Due to recent sale price stability in the market area no market time adjustment has been applied to the comparables. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, age, bathroom count, cooling system, garage space count, enclosed porch, and patio. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, GLA, covered porch, patio, and fenced-in yard. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, GLA, deck, patio, fireplace, and sheds. Comparable #4 has been included to demonstrate the marketability of conventional built houses in the subject's immediate neighborhood. It has been adjusted for its site size, age, GLA, basement, garage space count, porch, patio, and fenced-in yard. It has received a minimal age adjustment due to a large addition onto the house in 1995. It has been given little weight. A search was made for a comparable sale the bracket the subject's site size, but none were found. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value. Most weight has been applied to Comparables #1, #2, & #3. Based on the sale price per gross living area it appears that the subject has sold below market value.
